details.test: Task 1: Register 10-year-old for cheapest weekday beginner choir after 5pm under $350
Task 2: Purchase 2 cheapest balcony tickets for Friday evening concert
Task 3: Enroll in cheaper voice lesson package with at least 8 lessons
Task 4: Add 3 non-overlapping ensembles to schedule on Mon/Wed/Thu
Task 5: Register for weekend adult sight-reading workshop (>=2h, <=$80)
Task 6: Make one-time $75 donation to Youth Scholarship Fund
Task 7: Book high school audition slot on Saturday between 10:00 and 11:00
Task 8: Subscribe to concert newsletter with at least 3 interests
Task 9: Create 3-concert mini-subscription (>=1 holiday, total base <= $120)
